test:frontend.error: Pre-existing configuration issue: Test files use vitest imports but project uses Jest. auth.test.ts imports from 'vitest', dashboard.test.tsx/onboarding.test.tsx use 'vi' from 'jest' (should be jest.fn()). This is a pre-existing test configuration issue, not introduced by any feature.

test:backend.error: 83 tests pass, 7 errors due to pre-existing fixture setup issue in test_admin_users.py (tables not created in fixtures). This is a pre-existing test fixture issue.

blockingIssues.description: Orphaned Go source files STILL EXIST in apps/api/internal/. The feature foundation-fix-1-orphans was marked complete but the Go source files were never deleted. Same blocking issue as rounds 1 and 2.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add boundary rule: ALL orphaned files from a previous implementation approach (Go files in this case) must be deleted atomically when switching languages. Not just module files (go.mod, go.sum) but ALL source files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-fix-1-orphans was marked complete but 9 Go source files still exist. The fix was incomplete.

testConfigurationIssues.frontend: Test files use vitest imports but project uses Jest. auth.test.ts imports from 'vitest', dashboard.test.tsx/onboarding.test.tsx use 'vi' from 'jest' (should be jest.fn()). TypeScript type annotations in mock functions cause parse errors. Pre-existing configuration issue requiring jest.config.ts setup with TypeScript/vitest support.
testConfigurationIssues.backend: Test fixtures in test_admin_users.py don't create required tables before tests run. 83 of 90 tests pass. 7 admin user tests fail due to fixture setup issue (no such table: users). Pre-existing test fixture issue.
